% ---------- Packages ----------
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[indonesian,english]{babel}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{multicol}
\usepackage{ragged2e}
\usepackage{xcolor}

% ---------- Remove default navigation ----------
\setbeamertemplate{navigation symbols}{}

% ---------- Color Palette ----------
\definecolor{BrandBlue}{HTML}{1F5AA6}
\definecolor{BrandBlueDark}{HTML}{153E75}
\definecolor{BrandBlueSoft}{HTML}{DCEBFA}
\definecolor{BrandCream}{HTML}{F7F1E6}
\definecolor{BrandSand}{HTML}{E8DCC8}
\definecolor{BrandText}{HTML}{243447}
\definecolor{BrandMuted}{HTML}{6B7A8C}
\definecolor{BrandAccent}{HTML}{5C8FDB}
\definecolor{BrandWhite}{HTML}{FFFDFC}

% ---------- Theme colors ----------
\setbeamercolor{normal text}{fg=BrandText,bg=BrandWhite}
\setbeamercolor{structure}{fg=BrandBlue}
\setbeamercolor{frametitle}{fg=BrandBlueDark,bg=BrandCream}
\setbeamercolor{title}{fg=BrandWhite}
\setbeamercolor{subtitle}{fg=BrandBlueSoft}
\setbeamercolor{author}{fg=BrandWhite}
\setbeamercolor{date}{fg=BrandBlueSoft}
\setbeamercolor{block title}{fg=BrandWhite,bg=BrandBlue}
\setbeamercolor{block body}{fg=BrandText,bg=BrandCream}
\setbeamercolor{itemize item}{fg=BrandBlue}
\setbeamercolor{itemize subitem}{fg=BrandAccent}
\setbeamercolor{section in toc}{fg=BrandBlueDark}

% ---------- Typography ----------
\setbeamerfont{title}{series=\bfseries,size=\LARGE}
\setbeamerfont{subtitle}{size=\large}
\setbeamerfont{frametitle}{series=\bfseries,size=\Large}
\setbeamerfont{block title}{series=\bfseries}

% ---------- Frame title styling ----------
\setbeamertemplate{frametitle}{%
  \vspace{0.25cm}
  \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=\paperwidth,ht=1cm,dp=0.25cm,leftskip=0.7cm,rightskip=0.3cm]{frametitle}
    {\usebeamerfont{frametitle}\insertframetitle}
    \ifx\insertframesubtitle\@empty
    \else
      \\ \vspace{1pt}{\small\color{BrandMuted}\insertframesubtitle}
    \fi
  \end{beamercolorbox}
}

% ---------- Footer ----------
\setbeamertemplate{footline}{%
  \leavevmode%
  \hbox{%
    \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=.72\paperwidth,ht=3.2ex,dp=1.4ex,leftskip=0.5cm]{author in head/foot}%
      \color{BrandMuted}\scriptsize Gifting Site Business Presentation
    \end{beamercolorbox}%
    \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=.28\paperwidth,ht=3.2ex,dp=1.4ex,rightskip=0.5cm]{date in head/foot}%
      \hfill\color{BrandMuted}\scriptsize\insertframenumber/\inserttotalframenumber
    \end{beamercolorbox}%
  }
}

% ---------- Helpers ----------
\newcommand{\pill}[1]{%
  \tikz[baseline=(X.base)] \node (X) [rounded corners=7pt, fill=BrandBlueSoft, text=BrandBlueDark, inner xsep=8pt, inner ysep=3pt, font=\scriptsize\bfseries] {#1};%
}

\newcommand{\statcard}[3]{%
  \begin{tikzpicture}
    \node[rounded corners=12pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, line width=0.6pt,
          minimum width=0.29\linewidth, minimum height=2.15cm, align=left, inner sep=10pt] {
      \begin{minipage}{0.25\linewidth}
      {\color{BrandMuted}\scriptsize #1}\\[2pt]
      {\color{BrandBlueDark}\LARGE\bfseries #2}\\[2pt]
      {\color{BrandText}\scriptsize #3}
      \end{minipage}
    };
  \end{tikzpicture}%
}

\newcommand{\featurebox}[2]{%
  \begin{tikzpicture}
    \node[rounded corners=10pt, fill=BrandWhite, draw=BrandBlueSoft, line width=0.7pt,
          inner sep=10pt, text width=0.9\linewidth, align=left] {
      {\color{BrandBlueDark}\bfseries #1}\\[3pt]
      {\color{BrandText}\small #2}
    };
  \end{tikzpicture}%
}

% ---------- Presentation Info ----------
\title{GiftFlow}
\subtitle{Modern gifting platform for curated corporate and personal gifts}
\author{Your Name / Brand}
\date{March 2026}

\begin{document}

% ---------- Title ----------

  \fill[BrandAccent, opacity=0.20] (11.8,1.1) circle (1.6);
  \draw[BrandWhite, line width=1pt, rounded corners=10pt] (4.4,1.2) rectangle (12.5,5.7);
\end{tikzpicture}

\vspace{1.15cm}
\hspace{4.8cm}
\begin{minipage}{0.54\paperwidth}
  {\usebeamerfont{title}\color{BrandWhite}\inserttitle\\[0.25cm]}
  {\usebeamerfont{subtitle}\color{BrandBlueSoft}\insertsubtitle\\[0.55cm]}
  {\color{BrandWhite}\small Designed for a business gifting site deck: clean, warm, and slightly playful.\\[0.45cm]}
  \pill{B2B Gifting}\hspace{0.15cm}\pill{Curated Catalog}\hspace{0.15cm}\pill{Blue \& Cream Theme}\\[0.8cm]
  {\color{BrandWhite}\small \insertauthor}\qquad{\color{BrandBlueSoft}\small \insertdate}
\end{minipage}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Agenda ----------
\begin{frame}{Agenda}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.52\textwidth}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Problem in corporate and personal gifting
  \item Product solution and ordering flow
  \item Business model and target market
  \item Key differentiators and next steps
\end{itemize}

\column{0.42\textwidth}
\begin{block}{Suggested use}
This template works well for:\\[3pt]
\begin{itemize}
  \item investor deck,
  \item client pitch,
  \item partnership intro,
  \item internal strategy presentation.
\end{itemize}
\end{block}
\end{columns}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Problem ----------
\begin{frame}{The Problem}{Why gifting still feels inefficient}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.58\textwidth}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Companies need gifts that feel \textbf{thoughtful}, not generic.
  \item Procurement teams often manage gifting through \textbf{manual chat, spreadsheets, and ad-hoc vendors}.
  \item Personal buyers want \textbf{fast curation}, custom notes, and reliable delivery.
  \item Existing options usually lack \textbf{branding, bundling, and tracking} in one place.
\end{itemize}

\column{0.38\textwidth}
\featurebox{Pain Point 1}{Too many manual steps from selection to shipping.}\\[0.18cm]
\featurebox{Pain Point 2}{Low personalization makes gifts feel forgettable.}\\[0.18cm]
\featurebox{Pain Point 3}{No clean dashboard for bulk orders and repeat gifting.}
\end{columns}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Solution ----------
\begin{frame}{Our Solution}{Curated gifting, ordering, and delivery in one platform}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.55\textwidth}
\begin{block}{Core value proposition}
A gifting site that helps users discover curated gift boxes, personalize the experience, and manage single or bulk orders through a smooth digital workflow.
\end{block}

\vspace{0.2cm}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Curated collections by occasion, budget, and audience
  \item Custom branding, greeting cards, and packaging add-ons
  \item Bulk ordering for teams, clients, and campaigns
  \item Order tracking and repeat-order convenience
\end{itemize}

\column{0.40\textwidth}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \node[rounded corners=12pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, text width=0.95\linewidth, inner sep=10pt] {
    \textbf{Simple promise}\\[4pt]
    \small \textit{Make gifting feel premium without making operations complicated.}
  };
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{columns}
\end{frame}

% ---------- How it works ----------
\begin{frame}{How It Works}{Customer journey in 4 steps}
\centering
\begin{tikzpicture}[x=1cm,y=1cm]
  \node[rounded corners=10pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, minimum width=2.5cm, minimum height=2.15cm, align=center] at (1.5,0) {\textbf{Browse}\\[4pt]\scriptsize Explore curated gift sets};
  \node[rounded corners=10pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, minimum width=2.5cm, minimum height=2.15cm, align=center] at (5.0,0) {\textbf{Personalize}\\[4pt]\scriptsize Add notes, branding,\\ packaging};
  \node[rounded corners=10pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, minimum width=2.5cm, minimum height=2.15cm, align=center] at (8.5,0) {\textbf{Order}\\[4pt]\scriptsize Checkout single\\ or bulk requests};
  \node[rounded corners=10pt, fill=BrandCream, draw=BrandSand, minimum width=2.5cm, minimum height=2.15cm, align=center] at (12.0,0) {\textbf{Deliver}\\[4pt]\scriptsize Track shipment\\ and confirmations};
  \draw[-latex, thick, BrandAccent] (2.85,0) -- (3.65,0);
  \draw[-latex, thick, BrandAccent] (6.35,0) -- (7.15,0);
  \draw[-latex, thick, BrandAccent] (9.85,0) -- (10.65,0);
\end{tikzpicture}

\vspace{0.55cm}
\pill{Fast checkout}\hspace{0.12cm}
\pill{Bulk order support}\hspace{0.12cm}
\pill{Brand customization}\hspace{0.12cm}
\pill{Order visibility}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Offerings ----------
\begin{frame}{Product Catalog}{Example gifting categories}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.48\textwidth}
\begin{block}{Corporate gifting}
\begin{itemize}
  \item onboarding kits
  \item client appreciation boxes
  \item festive hampers
  \item event merchandise bundles
\end{itemize}
\end{block}

\column{0.48\textwidth}
\begin{block}{Personal gifting}
\begin{itemize}
  \item birthday sets
  \item wellness boxes
  \item wedding / special occasion gifts
  \item custom surprise bundles
\end{itemize}
\end{block}
\end{columns}

\vspace{0.35cm}
\begin{center}
\statcard{Average Order Value}{Rp 350K+}{Example placeholder metric}
\hspace{0.2cm}
\statcard{Lead Time}{2--5 Days}{Depends on customization depth}
\hspace{0.2cm}
\statcard{Use Cases}{B2B + B2C}{Strong repeat-order potential}
\end{center}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Business model ----------
\begin{frame}{Business Model}{How the gifting site makes money}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.52\textwidth}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Margin from curated gift products and bundles
  \item Premium fees for personalization and branding
  \item Bulk-order packages for companies and events
  \item Subscription / recurring gifting for HR and sales teams
\end{itemize}

\column{0.44\textwidth}
\begin{block}{Growth levers}
\begin{itemize}
  \item seasonal campaigns
  \item corporate retention
  \item repeat gifting reminders
  \item partnership with local brands
\end{itemize}
\end{block}
\end{columns}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Market ----------
\begin{frame}{Target Market}{Who we serve first}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.33\textwidth}
\featurebox{SMEs \& startups}{Need practical branded gifts for clients, teams, and events.}

\column{0.33\textwidth}
\featurebox{HR \& People Teams}{Need onboarding kits, appreciation gifts, and milestone packages.}

\column{0.33\textwidth}
\featurebox{Personal Buyers}{Need quick, aesthetic, ready-to-send gifts without vendor hassle.}
\end{columns}

\vspace{0.45cm}
\begin{block}{Positioning}
We sit between generic marketplace gifting and high-friction manual custom vendors: curated enough to feel premium, structured enough to scale.
\end{block}
\end{frame}

% ---------- Differentiators ----------
\begin{frame}{Why Us}{Key differentiators}
\begin{columns}[T,totalwidth=\textwidth]
\column{0.48\textwidth}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Warm, curated visual experience
  \item Better support for personalization and branded packaging
  \item Suitable for both \textbf{single purchase} and \textbf{bulk operations}
  \item Operationally easier for repeat orders
\end{itemize}

\column{0.48\textwidth}

  \node[rounded corners=12pt, fill=BrandBlue, inner sep=12pt, text width=0.92\linewidth] {

    \color{BrandBlueSoft}\small Premium feel, human warmth, and smoother business execution.
  };

\end{columns}
\end{frame}
